title: Indirect speech in the past: il a dit que
subtitle: Report simple past information without changing too much.
duolingoBridge: Duolingo-style sentences often train direct answers; this lesson turns them into reported information.
overview: Knowledge point 1: use il/elle a dit que to report a statement.
Knowledge point 2: keep the sentence simple and clear before worrying about advanced tense shifts.

sections.title: Reported statement chunks
rows: we were going to arrive late

items.fr: Il a dit qu’il était malade hier.
items.en: He said that he was sick yesterday.

items.fr: Elle a expliqué qu’elle avait un problème avec son billet.
items.en: She explained that she had a problem with her ticket.
items.es: Explicó que tenía un problema con su billete.

items.fr: Mon ami a dit qu’il allait arriver un peu tard.
items.en: My friend said that he was going to arrive a little late.
items.es: Mi amigo dijo que iba a llegar un poco tarde.

items.fr: La prof a dit que l’exercice était important.
items.en: The teacher said that the exercise was important.
items.es: La profesora dijo que el ejercicio era importante.

items.fr: J’ai répondu que je pouvais le faire ce soir.
items.en: I answered that I could do it tonight.
items.es: Respondí que podía hacerlo esta noche.
